absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: load sanitized skill contracts from source/skills.json
count skills and match them against the current query
publish a digest so downstream modules can detect library changes
public_purpose: Exposes the sanitized recursive-question skill catalog as a queryable module.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: Expose the reusable recursive-question skill set as an anonymized System Zero module.
